calendar.matters:
Petition For Authority To Make Disbursements For Housing Expenses And To Fix And Allow Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jessica Jones, for Leo Bautista, Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel offers testimony as to why it should grant the instant petition. At the conclusion of testimony, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Make Disbursements For Housing Expenses And To Fix And Allow Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Jones for trustee Leo Bautista (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Authority to Make Disbursements for Housing Expenses and to Fix and Allow Attorney Fees and Costs.

The Court inquired whether the minor beneficiary's mother had been ordered to pay child support and noted that the petition calculated the requested housing contribution as one-third of the household expenses without identifying any increase in rent or utilities attributable to the beneficiary's return to the household.

Ms. Jones requested leave to file a supplemental submission addressing the Court's questions.

The Court permitted a supplemental filing and continued the matter to May 18, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
